about: This configurator will help you to configure your ESP3D 3.0 for a list of features that fit your needs, and be sure it will compile properly.
Some features share the same GPIO. This: Some features share the same GPIO. This includes Default (-1) pins resolved for your MCU.
Firmware downloads are disabled until ea: Firmware downloads are disabled until each GPIO is used by only one visible feature. Default (-1) pins are resolved for your MCU.
This will overwrite settings that are de: This will overwrite settings that are defined in the preset. Other tabs are included.
Load a starting profile for a common boa: Load a starting profile for a common board, then fine-tune in each tab.
Choose a board profile to load settings: Choose a board profile to load settings immediately (confirmation required). Fine-tune in each tab afterward.
No configurator snapshot in this file. D: No configurator snapshot in this file. Download configuration.h from this tool first (JSON block at end of file).
Snapshot JSON is corrupted or invalid.
Snapshot format is invalid (missing valu: Snapshot format is invalid (missing values object).
Could not read the selected file.
You will choose a configuration.h file g: You will choose a configuration.h file generated by this tool (snapshot at end of file).
